examples: These perceptive designs evoke a sense of optimism and approachability, warmth and friendliness.
The biggest difference between male and female voters was in how much they valued approachability.
Having an open mind is crucial in the workplace where approachability means access to new ideas and help.
After body language and social behavior, appearance, surprisingly, is a much smaller concern when working on approachability.
Players are measured on myriad personal attributes, including appeal, awareness, trustworthiness, and approachability.
